items.title_en: Iran is in the 'process of blinking' over the Strait of Hormuz, Petraeus says

items.desc_en: Ex-CIA director David Petraeus said that an initial successful peace deal with Tehran would see the Strait opened without any conditions.
items.desc_zh: 前中央情报局局长戴维·彼得雷乌斯表示，与德黑兰达成的初步成功和平协议将使海峡无条件开放。

items.title_en: First Hong Kong astronaut launches into space onboard Chinese mission
items.title_zh: 首位香港宇航员搭乘中国任务升入太空
items.desc_en: The 43-year-old police officer and mother of three serves as the team's payload scientist.
items.desc_zh: 这位 43 岁的警官和三个孩子的母亲担任该团队的有效载荷科学家。

items.title_en: Huawei plans new smartphone chips this fall as rivalry with Nvidia and Apple heats up
items.title_zh: 随着与英伟达和苹果的竞争加剧，华为计划于今年秋季推出新的智能手机芯片
items.desc_en: Chinese telecom giant Huawei announced Monday a new way of designing chips that improves their capabilities, despite U.S. restrictions on the company.
items.desc_zh: 中国电信巨头华为周一宣布了一种新的芯片设计方法，可以提高其性能，尽管美国对该公司实施了限制。

items.title_en: Rubio says 'solid' Iran deal may come on Monday
items.title_zh: 卢比奥表示“可靠”的伊朗协议可能会在周一达成
items.desc_en: The deal under discussion would involve a 60-day ceasefire extension during which the Strait of Hormuz would be reopened, US media reports.
items.desc_zh: 据美国媒体报道，正在讨论的协议将包括将停火期限延长 60 天，在此期间霍尔木兹海峡将重新开放。

items.title_en: European stocks expected to open higher as U.S.-Iran talks continue
items.title_zh: 随着美国与伊朗谈判的继续，欧洲股市预计将高开
items.desc_en: Stocks in Europe are tracking their Asian counterparts higher after Japan's Nikkei 225 breached 65,000 for the first time on Monday.
items.desc_zh: 日本日经 225 指数周一首次突破 65,000 点后，欧洲股市跟随亚洲股市走高。

items.title_en: Oil market at 'tank bottoms' in Asia, and Europe isn't far behind, warns Carlyle's Currie

items.desc_en: Oil markets are nearing minimum operating levels in Asia, with Europe likely next and the U.S. potentially facing shortages by July, said Carlyle's Jeff Currie.
items.desc_zh: 凯雷 (Carlyle) 的杰夫·柯里 (Jeff Currie) 表示，亚洲石油市场已接近最低运行水平，欧洲可能紧随其后，美国也可能在 7 月份面临短缺。

items.title_en: Americans are 'entrenched' in financial stress amid debt and price pressures
items.title_zh: 在债务和价格压力下，美国人陷入“根深蒂固”的财务压力
items.desc_en: Inflation and high debt levels continue cause financial anxiety for many Americans. Nonprofits can help with debt mangement.

items.title_zh: 增加退休储蓄的好处却鲜为人知

items.desc_zh: 财务顾问表示，节省更多的钱有双重好处，但往往被忽视。

items.title_en: China tech plays to ride out macro volatility
items.title_zh: 中国科技股抵御宏观波动
items.desc_en: The China stock play right now is to focus on artificial intelligence-related names, regardless of the slower economic growth, several analysts said.
items.desc_zh: 几位分析师表示，尽管经济增长放缓，但目前中国股市的重点是人工智能相关的股票。

items.title_en: People trapped under collapsed building in Philippines
items.title_zh: 菲律宾民众被困倒塌建筑下
items.desc_en: A search operation has so far rescued 24 people with no deaths reported at the site, in a city near the capital Manila.
items.desc_zh: 迄今为止，搜救行动已在首都马尼拉附近的一座城市营救了 24 人，现场没有死亡报告。

items.title_en: Blast targeting train kills at least 20 in Pakistan
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦火车爆炸造成至少20人死亡
items.desc_en: Officials say the train had been transporting military personnel home for Eid when it was attacked by armed separatists.
items.desc_zh: 官员们表示，这列火车在开斋节期间运送军事人员回家时遭到武装分裂分子的袭击。

items.title_en: tldx
items.title_zh: tldx
items.desc_en: Fast CLI to bulk-check domains via RDAP & MCP
items.desc_zh: 快速 CLI 通过 RDAP 和 MCP 批量检查域

items.title_en: Man killed in shark attack off Australia's north-east coast
items.title_zh: 男子在澳大利亚东北海岸附近的鲨鱼袭击中丧生
items.desc_en: The 39-year-old was fatally injured while swimming out at a shoal off the Cassowary Coast in Queensland.
items.desc_zh: 这名39岁的男子在昆士兰州食火鸡海岸附近的浅滩游泳时受重伤身亡。

items.title_en: Suspect killed after opening fire on Secret Service near White House
items.title_zh: 嫌疑人在白宫附近向特勤局开枪身亡
items.desc_en: Officials say a suspect approached a checkpoint near the building and opened fire, and that a bystander was wounded.
items.desc_zh: 官员称，一名嫌疑人走近大楼附近的检查站并开枪，一名旁观者受伤。

items.title_en: One dead, multiple injured after Russia launches wave of strikes on Ukraine
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯对乌克兰发动一波袭击造成一人死亡多人受伤
items.desc_en: Twenty-one people have been injured, including a 15-year-old boy, with damage reported across all districts of Kyiv.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，基辅所有地区均受到损害，共有 21 人受伤，其中包括一名 15 岁男孩。

items.desc_zh: 软件工程师的生产调试游戏

items.desc_zh: Facebook 群组的专用空间

items.title_en: From decades to years - AI could speed search for brain drugs hiding in plain sight
items.title_zh: 从几十年到几年——人工智能可以加速寻找隐藏在视线中的大脑药物
items.desc_en: Researchers hope the work will help identify affordable, effective drugs to treat conditions like MND.
items.desc_zh: 研究人员希望这项工作将有助于找到负担得起的、有效的药物来治疗 MND 等疾病。

items.title_en: Waymo pauses robotaxis in five US cities after cars drive into flooded roads
items.title_zh: 汽车驶入被洪水淹没的道路后，Waymo 在美国五个城市暂停了机器人出租车
items.desc_en: A Waymo spokesperson said it had expanded the temporary pause "out of an abundance of caution".
items.desc_zh: Waymo 发言人表示，“出于高度谨慎”，该公司扩大了暂时暂停的范围。

items.title_en: 'At a loss for words' - Destiny 2 fans react to news support is ending
items.title_zh: 《命运 2》粉丝对支持即将结束的消息反应“无言以对”
items.desc_en: Bungie said the online shooter will get its final update on 9 June but will still be playable.
items.desc_zh: Bungie 表示，这款在线射击游戏将于 6 月 9 日获得最终更新，但仍然可以玩。

items.desc_zh: 具有精细控制的人工智能音乐引擎

items.title_en: Elon Musk's SpaceX postpones Starship launch
items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克 (Elon Musk) 的 SpaceX 推迟了星际飞船的发射
items.desc_en: It comes just a day after the firm revealed plans for a record-breaking stock market debut.
items.desc_zh: 就在一天前，该公司公布了破纪录的股票上市计划。

items.desc_zh: X 帖子为干净的 Markdown

items.title_zh: LLMTest
items.desc_en: Use the right LLMs in your apps. Setup fallbacks. Be happy.
items.desc_zh: 在您的应用程序中使用正确的法学硕士。设置后备。要开心。

items.title_en: Love factually: Dating start-ups promise to cut the cheats
items.title_zh: 爱如实：约会初创公司承诺减少作弊行为
items.desc_en: Frustration with fake dating profiles has spurred new dating services with different approaches.
items.desc_zh: 对虚假约会资料的失望催生了采用不同方法的新约会服务。

items.title_en: UK police bosses urge unsafe platforms to be blocked for under-16s
items.title_zh: 英国警察局长敦促封锁 16 岁以下青少年的不安全平台
items.desc_en: The NCA and NPCC say children should be blocked from accessing sites which do not stop them seeing nudes or being contacted by strangers.
items.desc_zh: NCA 和 NPCC 表示，应该阻止儿童访问不能阻止他们看到裸体或与陌生人联系的网站。

items.title_en: Meta settles social media addiction case with US school district
items.title_zh: Meta 与美国学区解决社交媒体成瘾案
items.desc_en: The trial had been set as a test case for 1200 other school districts making similar claims.
items.desc_zh: 该审判已被定为其他 1200 个做出类似主张的学区的测试案例。

items.title_en: own.page
items.title_zh: own.page
items.desc_en: Make your own personal website with bento tiles
items.desc_zh: 使用便当瓷砖制作您自己的个人网站

items.title_en: TikTok and YouTube 'not safe enough' for kids, says Ofcom
items.title_zh: Ofcom 表示 TikTok 和 YouTube 对儿童来说“不够安全”
items.desc_en: YouTube said it worked with experts to provide appropriate experiences. TikTok said it was disappointed Ofcom had not acknowledged its safety features.
items.desc_zh: YouTube 表示，它与专家合作提供适当的体验。 TikTok 表示，对于 Ofcom 没有承认其安全功能感到失望。

items.title_en: SpaceX files for IPO that could make Elon Musk a trillionaire
items.title_zh: SpaceX 申请 IPO 可能使埃隆·马斯克成为万亿富翁
items.desc_en: Musk's rocket-maker and satellite internet provider will trade under the ticker SPCX
items.desc_zh: 马斯克的火箭制造商和卫星互联网提供商将以股票代码 SPCX 进行交易

items.title_en: US groups urge investigation into child safety and spending on Roblox
items.title_zh: 美国团体敦促对儿童安全和 Roblox 支出进行调查
items.desc_en: Roblox said it had "clear policies" banning actual and simulated gambling, as well as rules governing paid random items.
items.desc_zh: Roblox 表示，它有“明确的政策”禁止实际和模拟赌博，以及管理付费随机项目的规则。

items.title_en: Google to release first smart glasses since Google Glass flop
items.title_zh: 谷歌将推出自谷歌眼镜失败以来首款智能眼镜
items.desc_en: The glasses will go on sale sometime in autumn and allow Google's artificial intelligence product to interact with a user.
items.desc_zh: 这款眼镜将于秋季某个时候上市销售，让谷歌的人工智能产品能够与用户互动。

items.desc_zh: 我们与专家讨论人工智能黑客的风险

items.title_en: Zoe Kleinman: Why the AI industry is the real winner of the Musk-Altman trial
items.title_zh: Zoe Kleinman：为什么人工智能行业是马斯克-奥特曼试验的真正赢家
items.desc_en: The trial in Oakland, California has helped lift the veil on the AI sector - and the huge egos of the men at the heart of it.
items.desc_zh: 加利福尼亚州奥克兰的试验揭开了人工智能领域的面纱，以及该领域核心人物的巨大自负。

items.title_zh: 埃隆·马斯克刚刚又输掉了另一场官司。他会继续战斗吗？
items.desc_en: Musk's loss against OpenAI is the latest in a string of courtroom defeats.
items.desc_zh: 马斯克输给 OpenAI 是一系列法庭失败中的最新一起。
